chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: 今日は私のブラウザのタブについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually keep about twenty tabs open at once.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい一度に20個くらいのタブを開いています。

chunks.en: One site I keep open all day is Gmail.
chunks.ja: 一日中開いておくサイトの一つはGmailです。

chunks.en: Another site I always use is our team chat.
chunks.ja: いつも使うもう一つのサイトはチームのチャットです。

chunks.en: I close old tabs when my browser gets slow.
chunks.ja: ブラウザが遅くなったら古いタブを閉じます。

chunks.en: To find the tab I want, I use search.
chunks.ja: 目的のタブを見つけるために、検索を使います。

chunks.en: Sometimes I lose a tab and it's really annoying.
chunks.ja: 時々タブを見失って、それが本当に面倒です。

chunks.en: So I'm trying to keep fewer tabs open now.
chunks.ja: だから今は開くタブを減らすようにしています。

outline: Opening: talk about my browser tabs
Point 1: how many tabs and which sites stay open
Point 2: when I close tabs and how I find them
Wrap-up: trying to keep fewer tabs

modelTalk.text: I love my browser tabs. I always keep many tabs open. Sometimes I've got twenty tabs or more. It's a lot, I know. Some sites stay open all day. I keep my email open every day. I keep music and my chat app too. I don't close them. But my old tabs get messy fast. So I close them at night. I also close them when my computer feels slow. Finding the right tab can be hard. I use the little search box for tabs. I just type a word and it shows up. That's quick and easy. I like my tabs, but I try to stay tidy.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: 今日は私のブラウザのタブについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually keep about twenty tabs open.
chunks.ja: 私はいつも20個くらいのタブを開いています。

chunks.en: I keep my email and chat open all day.
chunks.ja: 私はメールとチャットを一日中開いています。

chunks.en: I also keep our team's task board open.
chunks.ja: 私はチームのタスクボードも開いておきます。

chunks.en: I close old tabs at the end of the day.
chunks.ja: 私は一日の終わりに古いタブを閉じます。

chunks.en: I find the tab I want by using search.
chunks.ja: 私は検索を使って欲しいタブを見つけます。

chunks.en: So that's how I manage my browser tabs.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが私のブラウザのタブの管理の仕方です。

outline: Opening: talk about my browser tabs
Point 1: how many tabs and which sites stay open
Point 2: when I close tabs and how I find them
Wrap-up: how I manage my tabs

modelTalk.text: I've got a small problem. I always keep too many tabs open. Sometimes there are twenty tabs. It's a bit crazy, I know. Some sites stay open all day. My email is always there. My music is always there too. Plus I keep one tab for chat with friends. I don't close old tabs very often. But on Friday I clean them up. I close the old ones I don't need. So how do I find the right tab? Well, I look at the little pictures on top. That helps me a lot. Sometimes I just search the tab name. And then I'm happy again.
